attentionDescription: We attract your attention using attractive advertisements and engaging content across various media channels.
interestDescription: We build your interest in our products and services by providing additional information and highlighting benefits and features.
desireDescription: We aim to turn your interest into a genuine desire to purchase by enhancing the benefits of our products and offering enticing deals to make them more appealing.
actionDescription: We facilitate your purchase process by providing an easy and convenient experience, with additional incentives such as discounts and free shipping to encourage you to take the final action.
aidaDescription: AIDA is a marketing strategy based on the four letters, each representing a fundamental stage in the strategy.
